creator: gabriel_ambuehl@buz.ch
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Hello Ryan,

Monday, August 20, 2001, 11:54:49 PM, you wrote:
> As for ports/24692, I had to make sure I ran "quotaon /fs" before
> using setquota.

Since I upgraded to 4.3, it's working perfectly for me.

> Now... on the other hand I was able to grind-to-a-halt /fs when I
> ran setquota on more than one user.

> # setquota -u -f /users -bs100M -bh100M user1

> works ok.  Then,

> # setquota -u -f /users -bs100M -bh100M user2

No problem for me with
setquota -g -f /home -bs100000 usera
setquota -g -f /home -bs100000 userb

> The prompt never comes back.  An "ls /users" in another vc, just
> hangs.  The only way to return from it is a reboot.  Now, what's
> even worse for me is that /users is a 895GB file system.... let's
> just say the fsck takes a while.

Uh I can imagine. Have you got softupdates on?




Best regards,
 Gabriel
